changelog:
v0.9.9.X0 — 2026-03-17

ADDED
- Centralized versioning system: _vx_load_ver() reads .vx_meta/vx_version JSON at startup. Variables _VX_VER/_VX_NAME/_VX_AUTH used throughout — no version literals in source.
- Settings tab: new ⚡ PERFORMANCE sub-tab with throttle toggle, max workers, chunk size, scan delay, niceness slider and cross-link to Advanced.
- Recovery UI: new 🏷 VERSION tab — reads .vx_meta/vx_version independently, shows backup history, dynamic rollback picker, Open Updater button.
- Recovery UI: animated rectangle during REPAIR/INTEGRITY/PACKAGES operations. After stop: ✓ for 2.5s then idle pulse (· • ● •).
- Recovery UI: LOG tab now saves persistently to debug_log/recovery_ops/recovery_YYYYMMDD_HHMM.log.
- Recovery UI: PRIMARY ACTIONS section with clean button row layout.
- Standalone v0rtex_updater.py rewritten: Check GitHub, Download & Update, Rebuild Filesystem, Launch V0RTEX.
- Standalone v0rtex_recovery_ui.py rewritten: full embedded UI with REPAIR + LAUNCH tabs, sentinel-first launch logic.
- Background performance helpers _bg_nice() and _bg_scan_delay() to limit CPU/IO on heavy threads. Applied to _create_full_backup, _startup_compile, _defense_scan_folder, _dsc_run.
- Crash code 106 VERSION_MISSING: added to SOC_ERROR_CODES and Danger Zone simulation list. Auto-detected on startup if .vx_meta/vx_version missing (non-blocking background log).
- debug_log/recovery_ops/ added to subdirectory list created on startup and by setup wizard.

CHANGED
- 'INSTALLATION MEDIA' label renamed to 'V0RTEX UTILS' in Recovery UI.
- 'Keep admin privileges on startup' option removed from Settings UI.
- Admin required popup: larger buttons, navigates to Settings → Advanced → Startup Privileges (no UAC elevation prompt).
- System Fixer admin popup: removed 'Elevate to Admin (UAC)' button, replaced with Settings path instruction.
- Splash screen: prog_f padx reduced (20 → 12) to fix right-side rectangle overflow.
- _open_recovery_from_settings: made robust with thread fallback.

FIXED
- Full Scan (DSC) buttons not visible: _dsc_ctrl now packed before body with expand=True.
- System Fixer buttons not visible: bot_f moved before PanedWindow; window now resizable(True,True) with minsize(700,500).
- Recovery UI REPAIR layout: PRIMARY ACTIONS section now renders correctly.
- Recovery UI animation rectangle stopping correctly before showing checkmark.
- Standalone updater _detect_local() now correctly skips _ADM_BADGE_* markers.

SECURITY
- Version string no longer stored as a literal anywhere in source — assembled at runtime via _vx_load_ver() with JSON file + fragment fallback.
